signals.note: T4 · by Jul 3 — 2,123 bu (10% of 21,230) | Calendar cleanup — sell regardless of price
T3 · Jun–Jul — 1,174 bu (40% of 2,934) | Weather peak

call.headline: Sell remaining ~967 bu soy now. Hold corn.
call.detail: Soy hit its $11.44 seasonal target — still +5pp ahead of pace but starting to give back value. June bills are landing now; sell before prices drift lower. Corn is on pace and worth holding through summer.
